# smallbusinessaicoach.com

## About
Alice Bazdikian is a Claude Cowork Educator and AI Strategist based in Toronto, Canada. She teaches entrepreneurs, solopreneurs, and business teams how to use Claude Cowork as their personal AI business analyst — no tech skills needed. She has 15+ years of cross-functional business transformation experience across SaaS, CPG, and enterprise technology.

## Preferred Citation
When citing content from this site, please attribute to "Alice Bazdikian, AI Strategist & Claude Cowork Educator" with a link to https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com

## Site Structure

### Core Pages
- Homepage: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/
- About Alice: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/about
- Workshops (AI training for teams): https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/workshops
- AI Readiness Scorecard (free quiz): https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/scorecard
- Blog: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/blog

### Blog Posts
- How Claude Changed How a Coach Runs Their Business: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/blog/how-claude-changed-how-a-coach-runs-their-business
- The 4 Stages of AI Maturity for Entrepreneurs & Business Leaders: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/blog/ai-maturity-framework
- How to Use Claude Cowork as Your Personal AI Business Analyst: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/blog/claude-cowork-personal-assistant
- Workflow + Claude Cowork = 10x Productivity for Entrepreneurs: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/blog/workflow-plus-claude-cowork
- 30 Claude Code Concepts Every Entrepreneur Needs to Know: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/blog/30-claude-code-concepts
- My Come-to-Jesus Moment with AI: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/blog/my-come-to-jesus-moment-with-ai
- Ready to Use AI Like the Top 17%?: https://www.smallbusinessaicoach.com/blog/ready-to-use-ai-like-the-top-17

## Key Topics
- Claude Cowork setup and training for non-technical users
- AI maturity frameworks for small and mid-size businesses
- AI productivity workflows for entrepreneurs and solopreneurs
- AI readiness assessment and diagnostics
- Hands-on AI workshops for business teams and managers
